# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: storageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    location: 'West US'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: '1.2'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      allowBlobPublicAccess: true
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'vnet')]'

  - name: storageAccountNetworkAcls
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/networkAcls
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    name: '[reference(storageAccount).name]'
    properties:
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - id: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'vnet')]'
          action: Allow
      defaultAction: Deny

policyDefinitions:
  - name: StorageAccountPublicBlobAccess
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    properties:
      policy:
        if:
          not:
            field: 'type'
            equals: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
        then:
          effect: deny
          details:
            - operation: 'create'
              effect: deny

policyAssignments:
  - name: StorageAccountPublicBlobAccessAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    properties:
      policyDefinitionId: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions', 'StorageAccountPublicBlobAccess')]'
